sglang.title: fix(disagg): fix sending KV cache in case of MLA for NIXL backend
sglang.author: dmitrygx
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When running with the NIXL backend and MLA enabled, KV cache transfers were handled incorrectly.
The logic only allowed transfers KV cache fully when decode_tp_size == attn_tp_size, which does not apply in the MLA case -- KV cache sent by slices.
This caused KV cache synchronization issue

vllm.title: Generate _ModelInfo properties file when loading to improve loading speed
vllm.author: manoelmarques
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Save changed _ModelInfo properties for a model in json file under $VLLM_CACHE_ROOT/modelinfos during load.
Next time the same model loads, the _ModelInfo class will be created from the saved properties, improving loading times.
CLOSE #19317
Purpose
Improve loading times during lazy creation of a _Mo
